/usr/bin/clang++  -fsanitize=address,undefined -fno-omit-frame-pointer -g -arch arm64 -isysroot /Library/Developer/CommandLineTools/SDKs/MacOSX15.5.sdk -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names  -fsanitize=address,undefined CMakeFiles/TriangulationLab.dir/TriangulationLab_autogen/mocs_compilation.cpp.o CMakeFiles/TriangulationLab.dir/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/TriangulationLab.dir/MainWindow.cpp.o CMakeFiles/TriangulationLab.dir/facade/TriangulationFacade.cpp.o CMakeFiles/TriangulationLab.dir/facade/DebugFacade.cpp.o CMakeFiles/TriangulationLab.dir/widgets/TriangulationWidget.cpp.o CMakeFiles/TriangulationLab.dir/widgets/DebugControlsWidget.cpp.o CMakeFiles/TriangulationLab.dir/rendering/QPainterRenderer.cpp.o -o TriangulationLab -F/Users/lidia_minnegalieva/Qt/6.11.1/macos/lib  -Wl,-rpath,/Users/lidia_minnegalieva/Qt/6.11.1/macos/lib ../core/libcore.a /Users/lidia_minnegalieva/Qt/6.11.1/macos/lib/QtWidgets.framework/Versions/A/QtWidgets /Users/lidia_minnegalieva/Qt/6.11.1/macos/lib/QtOpenGL.framework/Versions/A/QtOpenGL /Users/lidia_minnegalieva/Qt/6.11.1/macos/lib/QtGui.framework/Versions/A/QtGui -framework AppKit -framework OpenGL -framework ImageIO -framework Metal /Users/lidia_minnegalieva/Qt/6.11.1/macos/lib/QtCore.framework/Versions/A/QtCore -framework IOKit -framework DiskArbitration -framework UniformTypeIdentifiers
